# ChatJimmy

> AI Registry entry [AIR-65](https://linear.app/janusd/issue/AIR-65/chatjimmy) — status **Backlog** as of 2026-04-02. Departments: office-of-ceo.

**Category:** Foundation Model / AI Inference Demo
**Status:** Backlog
**Cost:** Free (demo)
**Departments:** Office of CEO
**Parent:** Taalas (hardware AI inference startup)
**Requested by:** Bonaventure Wong

## Overview

Experimental AI chatbot by Taalas (hardware AI inference startup). Technology demo showcasing ultra-fast inference. Runs Llama 3.1. Notable primarily for speed, not intelligence.

## What Makes Notable

* Extremely low first-token latency
* High sustained throughput via specialised hardware
* Fastest publicly accessible AI chatbot demo (early 2026)
* Python API via GitHub

## What It's NOT

* Not production-ready (experimental/demo)
* Not competitor to Claude/Gemini/ChatGPT on reasoning quality
* No enterprise features, certifications, compliance posture
* Less accurate than mainstream models

## Relevance

Hardware/infrastructure play. Speed becoming competitive differentiator. Could be relevant if Janus moves toward self-hosted model inference. Aligns with broader OpenClaw/NemoClaw evaluation. Worth monitoring but not adopting.

*Backlog. Hardware/infrastructure monitor item.*
